detailMarkdown:
# AI Search Ranking Content Cluster Strategy Skill

Build SEO-forward content clusters that align with search intent, topical authority, and conversion pathways for AI tooling niches.

## Trust

- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/ai-search-ranking-content-cluster-strategy.zip -o ai-search-ranking-content-cluster-strategy.zip && unzip -o ai-search-ranking-content-cluster-strategy.zip -d ./ai-search-ranking-content-cluster-strategy
```

## Usage
Use this skill to build and operate content clusters that compound traffic and ranking over time.
